title: Condensed Locality: Lieb–Robinson Estimates and Quasi-Local Dynamics on the Moduli Stack of Hamiltonians
abstract: Condensing the space of quasi-local interactions and proving a uniform Lieb–Robinson bound over profinite families of Hamiltonians.

title: Positivity, C*-Norms, and Condensed State Spaces of Quasi-Local Algebras
abstract: Quasi-local C*-algebras, condensed state spaces, and the solid K-theory invariant built from positivity and GNS representations.

title: The Uniformly Gapped Substack: Existence and Stability of the Thermodynamic Spectral Gap
abstract: The uniformly gapped substack of the moduli stack of Hamiltonians: existence, stability, and the undecidability wall at its edge.

title: From Lattice Models to Effective Field Theories: Stabilization and the Invertible Condensed Phase Spectrum
abstract: Stacking phases into a commutative monoid and group-completing it into the invertible condensed phase spectrum IP^cond.

title: Physical Realizability of Bordism and Homotopy Classes by Gapped Lattice Systems
abstract: Which bordism and homotopy classes in the invertible phase spectrum are actually realized by explicit gapped lattice Hamiltonians.

title: Topological Phases of Matter in the Condensed-Mathematics Paradigm: A Modular Research Program
abstract: The capstone: composing all five modules into one spine from local interactions to the invertible condensed phase spectrum.
